name: Maritime Conflict
description: Maritime Conflict is a fastpaced naval strategy game where every shot counts. Scan the ocean, predict your opponent’s moves, and unleash precise attacks to sink their entire fleet. Each match is a tense, turnbased duel of wits, strategy, and luck. Perfect for players who enjoy classic battleshipstyle gameplay with a clean and modern presentation.
instructions: On PC play using your mouse click on the grid to select a target and fire your shots On mobile or tablet use your touchscreen tap the cells to attack and sink the enemy ships
